declarations.name: BentoLayout
declarations.summary:
BentoLayout - The primary layout component implementing a responsive Bento Grid.
Consolidates profile photo, bio, configurations, contact info, skills, education,
work experience, code projects, and blog posts into individual grid cards.

declarations.name: BentoLayoutStyles
declarations.summary:
Styles for the BentoLayout component.

Orchestrates the responsive grid layout for the bento box UI.
Supports mobile (flex column), tablet (6-column grid), and desktop (12-column grid) layouts.
Mobile styles use flex so this is only used when
screen and (width >= 769px)
Tablet -> 769 <= 1200 -> 6
Desktop -> >= 1201 -> 12

declarations.name: TransitionStyles
declarations.description: Standardized transition animations for page loads and state changes.

return.description: An array of {@link BentoBoxType} in the appropriate order for the DOM.

declarations.name: getBentoDOMOrder
declarations.description:
Determines the logical DOM order for bento box types based on grid placement.
Reading order follows Top-to-Bottom, then Start-to-End (Leading-to-Trailing).

declarations.name: BentoBoxConfigsArray
declarations.description: Produces an array of {@link ABentoBoxConfig} instances sorted for proper DOM order.

declarations.name: BentoCard
declarations.summary:
BentoCard - A reusable card component for the bento grid.

A reusable card component designed for implementation within a responsive Bento Grid layout.
It handles the visual properties of the grid items, including Material Design 3 container tokens,
glassmorphism filters, and interaction states.

## Features
- **Glassmorphism**: Built-in backdrop filters and semi-transparent backgrounds.
- **Interaction**: Optional elevation and translation on hover/focus, controlled via properties.
- **Theming**: Integrated with Material Design 3 tokens for consistent color and corner radius.
- **Expansion**: Built-in collapsible behavior using `<details>` and `<summary>` with smooth height transitions.
- **Header Styling**: Automatically styles slotted `h2` or `header`-slotted elements as section headers.
- **Scrolling**: Optional `scrollable` mode for internal content overflow.

members.name: bentoTag
members.description: Uniquely identifies this `BentoCard` via {@link BENTO_BOX_TYPES}

members.name: scrollable
members.description: Whether to enable scrolling for content

members.name: expanded
members.description:
Reflects and controls the open state of the underlying `<details>` element.
When `true`, the card is expanded and content is visible.

members.name: enableHover
members.description:
Whether to enable the lift-on-hover effect.
Defaults to `false` to minimize visual motion in dense layout grids.

members.name: enableFocus
members.description:
Whether to enable enhanced border and shadow styling on focus-within.
Defaults to `false`.

members.name: bentoCardTitle
members.description:
The clickable text for the `<h2>` in the `<summary>` element.  When provided,
the exposed `slot[name="header"]` is suppressed.

members.name: spreadContent
members.description: Whether to spread content over the entire body

members.name: _handleToggle
members.description:
Synchronizes the `expanded` property with the state of the `<details>` element
whenever the user interacts with the toggle icon or summary.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Content to be displayed in the card's header/summary area.
Default slot for card content. Slotted `h2` elements receive standardized header styling.

declarations.name: BentoCardStyles
declarations.summary:
Styles for the BentoCard component.

Implements glassmorphism using `backdrop-filter` and semi-transparent background colors
derived from Material Design 3 surface tokens. Provides interaction feedback via
CSS transitions on hover, including elevation (shadow), border color shifts, and translation.

Includes specific styling for slotted `h2` elements to ensure visual consistency
for section headers within the bento grid layout.

declarations.name: UiModeToggle
declarations.summary:
A standalone component for managing and toggling the UI color scheme (light, dark, system)
and persistence. This component acts as a wrapper around the `dark-mode-toggle` custom element,
integrating its functionality with the application"s global `configsService` for state management
and `themeService` for dynamic theme application.

members.name: _ready
members.description:
Guards against the synthetic `colorschemechange` / `permanentcolorscheme`
events that `dark-mode-toggle` dispatches at the end of its
`connectedCallback` (which runs *during* this element's first render).
Reacting to that echo would mutate reactive state mid-update — triggering
Lit's `change-in-update` warning — and would clobber a `SYSTEM` preference
with the resolved light/dark value. We only honor these events once the
first render has completed (i.e. after a genuine user toggle).

members.name: reset
members.description: Resets the UI mode toggle to its default settings.

events.name: colorschemechange
events.description: Event from `dark-mode-toggle` when the scheme changes.

events.name: permanentcolorscheme
events.description: Event from `dark-mode-toggle` when the persistence changes.

members.name: styles
formattedDate
members.description:
Creates an {@link Intl.DateTimeFormat} and calls {@link Intl.DateTimeFormat.format}
on {@link time} to render the user presented timestamp
members.default:
new Intl.DateTimeFormat(
    navigator.languages,
    {
      hour: "2-digit",
      minute: "2-digit",
      second: "2-digit",
      month: "2-digit",
      day: "2-digit",
      year: "numeric",
      hour12: false,
    }
  ).format(time)

declarations.name: WordCloud
declarations.description: A component that renders a cloud of words with various sorting and grouping options.

members.name: words
members.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

members.name: instantClear
members.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

members.name: appearance
members.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

members.name: grouping
members.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

members.name: sorting
members.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

members.name: delay
members.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

members.name: threshold
members.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-animation
cssProperties.description: Duration of the entrance animation for each word.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-animation-reduced
cssProperties.description: Duration of the entrance animation when prefers-reduced-motion is active.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the first weight quartile (highest weight).

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the first weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the second weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the second weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the third weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the third weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the fourth weight quartile (lowest weight).

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the fourth weight quartile.

declarations.name: WordTag
declarations.summary: Displays a word in a simple padded box in which the text color and border are synchronised

slots.name: icon
slots.description: The optional space available for, and positioned by, the {@link variant} property

declarations.name: WorkExperience
declarations.summary:
A component for displaying professional work experience entries.  Supports nesting
for sub-roles or specific project assignments under a single employer.

members.name: isNested
members.description: If true, adjusts font sizes and layout for a nested appearance.

members.name: experienceRole
members.description: The title of the professional role or project.

members.name: experienceOrg
members.description: The name of the organization or client.

members.name: dateStart
members.description: Start date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.

members.name: dateEnd
members.description: End date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.

members.name: summaries
members.description: A list of summary points describing achievements or responsibilities.

members.name: jobs
members.description: A list of sub-jobs or project assignments to be rendered as nested experiences.

members.name: render
members.description: Renders the experience entry, conditionally applying styles based on nesting level.
